title: G4GADGET 7.5 Meter Tape Measure – Heavy Duty 25mm Wide Blade, Retractable Griplock Design, Metric & Imperial Markings, Shockproof Rubber Case, Professional Measuring Tool
features: ✅ Precision Griplock System – Features a secure thumb lock slider and smooth retraction mechanism to lock the blade exactly where you need it, helping you take accurate readings with confidence.
✅ 25mm Wide Blade for Clear Readings – The bold, extra-wide 25mm blade ensures maximum visibility and stability while measuring long spans—ideal for professional contractors and serious DIYers.
✅ Dual Markings in Metric & Imperial – Clearly printed metric (meters/cm) and imperial (feet/inches) units make this tape measure perfect for projects that demand versatility and no guesswork.
✅ Heavy Duty & Shockproof – Durable rubberized outer case absorbs shocks and drops, while the nylon-coated blade resists wear, rust, and glare—engineered for tough jobsite conditions.

✅ 7.5M Length with Impressive Standout – Reach further with an extended 7.5-meter blade and standout strength to measure long distances solo without bending. Comes with belt clip and wrist strap for portability.

✅ 3-Way Locking System – Equipped with two temporary hold buttons on the side and front, plus a top lock slider to secure the blade at any position. This triple-lock design offers superior control and flexibility for tasks that demand accuracy, outperforming ordinary tape measures.
description: From the manufacturer Precision at Your Fingertips - 5M Tape Measuring Tool for Accurate Results When it comes to measuring, accuracy is key. That's why our 5M Tape Measuring Tool is the perfect addition to your toolkit. With a compact and lightweight design, it's easy to carry with you wherever you go, making it ideal for a wide range of applications.
